jobs.title: Solution Consultant CRM
jobs.description:
Role Description

As a Senior Solution Consultant within the Solution Consulting team, this role provides expertise in the following areas:
Providing up to date knowledge, awareness of current trends and future direction of the Private Banking and Wealth Management industries

Presenting & explaining existing FNZ capability

Defining and challenging scope of a project

Capturing & documenting customer business outcomes to create requirements, solution designs and agreeing of Joint Target Operating Models

Platform integration design

Business transformation support and consultancy services

Regulations and advice on platform compliance

Customer training programmes and knowledge transfer

Platform configuration and delivery based on FNZ’s methodology

Analyst & Developer handovers and support

Functional Reviews & TDD walkthroughs

Defining business readiness processes and agreeing SLAs Defect verification

On top of the above the Senior Solution Consultant role also performs and assists with:
Propositional Leadership and driving product re-use across FNZ clients

Training and mentoring for other solution consultants

Ownership of platform solutions and ensuring they work end to end

Define and rollout of new processes

Strategic Roadmap production and maintenance

Scope Prioritisation

Backlog Set Up and Maintenance

Supporting recruitment and development of new talent

Supporting Project Managers in managing clients throughout the delivery cycle

Supporting estimations and scheduling of build items

Motivating and driving best outcomes from others on their project

Supporting sales team

             
Team Responsibilities
The Solution Consulting team is responsible for providing a range of high value services to FNZ’s existing and potential customers.

This includes being responsible for the Platform configuration and running the FNZ Model Wealth Solution configuration process for new platform implementations, plus supporting sales team in winning & sizing new projects.

It also involves carrying out a variety of consulting assignments for existing customers and new customers in a variety of contexts, including proposition definition, TOM definition, Business transformation, customer training and knowledge transfer, and the definition of bespoke requirements where required for customer platform solutions.  

Once business outcomes are understood from FNZ clients, these must be accurately documented and fed them into the delivery process to ensure they are easily understood and precise to deliver the right outcome for our clients.

Specific Role Responsibilities
Provide leadership and support for the FNZ Solution Consulting team, building capability and providing support for more junior members of the team. Instil a spirit of continuous improvement in the team.

Work with FNZ customers & internal stakeholders to help define proposition and product requirements. Provide Market expertise as required. Be an SME in FNZ platform functionality and apply this understanding to help customers define propositions that best utilise or enhance FNZ core platform capabilities.

Have a full understanding of a Platform Target Operating Model, including the interfaces between platform and customers operations and FNZ Investment operations. Provide advice to customers regarding best practice operating model design.

Be an expert in the Model Wealth Solution and run the MWS Configuration process for new platform implementations, capturing all customer configuration points in service configuration documents.

Be a propositional leader, take ownership of FNZ client propositions and help guide them effectively to deliver platform change which is market leading.

Have a delivery focused view to scope definition, be able to break scope items down into core and nice to have functional elements so these can be delivered over multiple releases if required. 

Document any bespoke customer requirements and translate these into platform solutions.

Take ownership for delivering platform change to FNZ clients, lead within the delivery team to ensure we deliver on-time and to quality. 

Provide review and quality assurance of design documentation produced for new platform solutions, ensuring the function end to end and incorporate re-use of existing functionality where possible. 

Provide training programmes and knowledge transfer services for FNZ customers.

Provide consultancy services, as required, to other FNZ clients and projects. 

Experience required
Required Industry Knowledge
Expertise in CRM, KYC, onboarding and customer’s information management

Leadership experience in a consulting, analysis or architecture environment.

Private banking/Wealth Management/General investment products and the markets in which FNZ and our customers operate.

 An understanding of the regulatory environment FNZ operates within and a knowledge of the upcoming changes.

5+ years of experience in a delivery/consulting environment in the  financial services/wealth market.

Required Knowledge & Skills
Experience working within a business analysis / consulting role.

Be able to evidence establishing an environment of continuous improvement and capability development.

Strong knowledge in database such as Oracle/MS SQL server management Studio is mandatory

Confident, and able to take initiative given client– and delivery-focused environment.

Independent, self-directing and delivery focused working style.

Superior analytical thinking.

Commercially aware.

Intermediate computer skills essential.

Excellent organisational, administration and time management skills.

Good team communication skills, confident in dealing with internal and external clients.

Highly developed written and oral communication skills.

English fluent Mandatory. French or German fluent is a strong asset

Willing to travel inter region on demand

About FNZ

FNZ is committed to opening up wealth so that everyone, everywhere can invest in their future on their terms. We know the foundation to do that already exists in the wealth management industry, but complexity holds firms back. 

We created wealth’s growth platform to help. We provide a global, end-to-end wealth management platform that integrates modern technology with business and investment operations. All in a regulated financial institution. 

We partner with the world’s leading financial institutions, with over US$2.2 trillion in assets on platform (AoP).

Together with our clients, we empower nearly 30 million people across all wealth segments to invest in their future.

FNZ is a global fintech platform provider that partners with financial institutions, wealth managers, and asset managers. The company has Swiss operations in Chiasso (Ticino) and Geneva.

descriptionByLocale.it: Mansioni ### Descrizione del ruolo Come Senior Solution Consultant nel team Solution Consulting, questo ruolo offre competenze nelle seguenti aree: - Fornire conoscenze aggiornate, consapevolezza delle tendenze attuali e della direzione futura delle industrie Private Banking e Wealth Management - Presentare ed spiegare le capacità esistenti di FNZ - Definire e sfidare lo scope di un progetto - Capturare e documentare gli obiettivi aziendali dei clienti per creare requisiti, progetti soluzioni e accordare modelli operativi di riferimento congiunti (Joint Target Operating Models) - Progettazione di integrazione delle piattaforme - Supporto e consulenza per trasformazione aziendale - Regolamentazione e consigli sulla conformità della piattaforma - Programmi di formazione dei clienti e trasferimento di conoscenze - Configurazione e consegna della piattaforma basata sul metodo di FNZ - Handovers e supporto per Analisti e Sviluppatori - Recensioni funzionali e walkthrough di TDD - Definire processi di preparazione aziendale e accordare SLAs - Verifica dei difetti Inoltre, il ruolo di Senior Solution Consultant esegue e supporta: - Leadership proposizionale e guida al riutilizzo del prodotto tra i clienti di FNZ - Formazione e mentoring per altri consulenti soluzioni - Proprietà delle soluzioni della piattaforma e assicurarsi che funzionino end-to-end - Definizione e rollout di nuovi processi - Produzione e manutenzione della Roadmap strategica - Prioritizzazione dello scope - Configurazione e manutenzione del backlog - Supporto alla recruitment e sviluppo del nuovo talento - Supporto ai Project Manager nella gestione dei clienti durante il ciclo di consegna - Supporto alle stime e alla pianificazione degli elementi di build - Motivazione e guida verso i migliori risultati da parte degli altri nei loro progetti - Supporto al team di vendite ### Responsabilità del team Il team Solution Consulting è responsabile di fornire una gamma di servizi ad alto valore ai clienti esistenti e potenziali di FNZ. Questo include essere responsabili per la configurazione della piattaforma e l'esecuzione del processo di configurazione della Model Wealth Solution per nuove implementazioni della piattaforma, oltre a supportare il team di vendite nella vincita e nella dimensionamento di nuovi progetti. Include anche l'esecuzione di una varietà di assegnazioni di consulenza per clienti esistenti e nuovi in vari contesti, inclusi definizione della proposta, definizione del TOM, trasformazione aziendale, formazione e trasferimento di conoscenze dei clienti, e la definizione di requisiti personalizzati per le soluzioni della piattaforma dei clienti. Una volta compresi gli obiettivi aziendali dai clienti di FNZ, questi devono essere documentati accuratamente e inseriti nel processo di consegna per assicurare che siano facilmente comprensibili e precisi per consegnare il risultato giusto ai nostri clienti. ### Responsabilità specifiche del ruolo - Fornire leadership e supporto per il team FNZ Solution Consulting, costruendo capacità e fornendo supporto ai membri più junior del team. Instillare uno spirito di miglioramento continuo nel team. - Collaborare con i clienti di FNZ e gli stakeholder interni per aiutare a definire la proposta e i requisiti del prodotto. Fornire esperienza di mercato quando richiesto. Essere un SME nella funzionalità della piattaforma FNZ e applicare questa comprensione per aiutare i clienti a definire proposte che utilizzino o migliorino al meglio le capacità della piattaforma core di FNZ. - Avere una piena comprensione di un Modello Operativo di Riferimento della Piattaforma, inclusi gli interfacci tra la piattaforma e le operazioni dei clienti e le operazioni di investimento di FNZ. Fornire consigli ai clienti riguardo il design del modello operativo di riferimento migliore. - Essere esperti nella Model Wealth Solution e gestire il processo di configurazione della MWS per nuove implementazioni della piattaforma, catturando tutti i punti di configurazione dei clienti nei documenti di configurazione del servizio. - Essere un leader proposizionale, assumere la proprietà delle proposte dei clienti di FNZ e aiutare a guidarli efficacemente per consegnare cambiamenti della piattaforma che siano leader di mercato. - Avere una visione focalizzata sulla consegna nella definizione dello scope, essere in grado di suddividere gli elementi dello scope in elementi funzionali essenziali e opzionali in modo che possano essere consegnati su più release se necessario. - Documentare qualsiasi requisito personalizzato del cliente e tradurli in soluzioni della piattaforma. - Assumere la proprietà per la consegna dei cambiamenti della piattaforma ai clienti di FNZ, guidare all'interno del team di consegna per assicurare che consegniamo in tempo e di qualità. - Fornire revisioni e assicurazione della qualità della documentazione di progettazione prodotta per le nuove soluzioni della piattaforma, assicurando che la funzione sia end-to-end e incorporando il riutilizzo della funzionalità esistente quando possibile. - Fornire programmi di formazione e servizi di trasferimento di conoscenze per i clienti di FNZ. - Fornire servizi di consulenza, quando richiesto, ad altri clienti e progetti di FNZ. ## Requisiti ### Conoscenze industriali richieste - Esperienza in CRM, KYC, onboarding e gestione delle informazioni dei clienti - Esperienza di leadership in un ambiente di consulenza, analisi o architettura - Private banking/Wealth Management/prodotti di investimento generali e i mercati in cui FNZ e i nostri clienti operano - Comprensione dell'ambiente regolatorio in cui FNZ opera e conoscenza dei cambiamenti in arrivo - 5+ anni di esperienza in un ambiente di consegna/consulenza nel mercato finanziario/wealth ### Conoscenze e competenze richieste - Esperienza di lavoro in un ruolo di business analysis/consulenza - Essere in grado di dimostrare la creazione di un ambiente di miglioramento continuo e sviluppo delle capacità - Conoscenza solida di database come Oracle/MS SQL Server Management Studio è obbligatoria - Sicuro e in grado di prendere l'iniziativa in un ambiente focalizzato sul cliente e sulla consegna - Indipendente, autosufficiente e stile di lavoro focalizzato sulla consegna - Pensiero analitico superiore - Consapevolezza commerciale - Competenze informatiche intermedie essenziali - Eccellenti competenze di organizzazione, amministrazione e gestione del tempo - Buone competenze di comunicazione di squadra, sicuro nel trattare con clienti interni ed esterni - Competenze di comunicazione scritta e orale altamente sviluppate - Inglese fluente obbligatorio. Francese o tedesco fluente è un forte asset - Disponibilità a viaggiare interregionale su richiesta ## Chi siamo FNZ è impegnata nell'apertura del patrimonio in modo che tutti, ovunque, possano investire nel loro futuro secondo i loro termini. Sappiamo che la base per farlo esiste già nell'industria di gestione del patrimonio, ma la complessità rallenta le aziende. Abbiamo creato la piattaforma di crescita del patrimonio per aiutare. Forniamo una piattaforma globale, end-to-end di gestione del patrimonio che integra tecnologia moderna con operazioni aziendali e di investimento. Tutto in un istituto finanziario regolamentato. Collaboriamo con le principali istituzioni finanziarie del mondo, con oltre US$2,2 trilioni di asset sulla piattaforma (AoP). Insieme ai nostri clienti, abilitiamo quasi 30 milioni di persone in tutti i segmenti del patrimonio a investire nel loro futuro. FNZ è un fornitore globale di piattaforme fintech che collabora con istituzioni finanziarie, gestori di patrimonio e gestori di asset. L'azienda ha operazioni svizzere a Chiasso (Ticino) e Ginevra.
descriptionByLocale.en: Roles ### Role Description As a Senior Solution Consultant in the Solution Consulting team, this role offers expertise in the following areas: - Provide up-to-date knowledge, awareness of current trends, and future direction of Private Banking and Wealth Management industries - Present and explain the existing capabilities of FNZ - Define and challenge the scope of a project - Capture and document customer business objectives to create requirements, solution projects, and align joint target operating models (JTOMs) - Platform integration design - Support and consulting for business transformation - Platform compliance regulation and advice - Customer training programs and knowledge transfer - Configuration and delivery of the platform based on FNZ's methodology - Handovers and support for Analysts and Developers - Functional reviews and walkthroughs of TDD - Define business preparation processes and align SLAs - Defect verification Additionally, the Senior Solution Consultant role performs and supports: - Proposal leadership and guidance on product reuse among FNZ customers - Training and mentoring for other solution consultants - Ownership of platform solutions and ensure they function end-to-end - Definition and rollout of new processes - Production and maintenance of the strategic roadmap - Scope prioritization - Configuration and maintenance of the backlog - Support for recruitment and development of new talent - Support to Project Managers in managing customers during the delivery cycle - Support for estimation and planning of build items - Motivation and guidance towards the best results from others in their projects - Support to the sales team ### Team Responsibilities The Solution Consulting team is responsible for providing a range of high-value services to FNZ's existing and potential customers. This includes being responsible for the configuration of the platform and the execution of the Model Wealth Solution configuration process for new platform implementations, as well as supporting the sales team in winning and sizing new projects. It also includes the execution of a variety of consulting assignments for existing and new customers in various contexts, including proposal definition, TOM definition, business transformation, customer training and knowledge transfer, and the definition of custom requirements for customer platform solutions. Once business objectives are understood from FNZ customers, these must be accurately documented and inserted into the delivery process to ensure they are easily understandable and precise for delivering the right result to our customers. ### Specific Role Responsibilities - Provide leadership and support for the FNZ Solution Consulting team, building capabilities and providing support to junior team members. Instill a culture of continuous improvement in the team. - Collaborate with FNZ customers and internal stakeholders to help define the proposal and product requirements. Provide market experience when requested. Be an SME in FNZ platform functionality and apply this understanding to help customers define proposals that best utilize or enhance FNZ's core platform capabilities. - Have a full understanding of a Platform Reference Operating Model, including interfaces between the platform and customer operations and FNZ investment operations. Provide advice to customers regarding the best design of the reference operating model. - Be experts in the Model Wealth Solution and manage the MWS configuration process for new platform implementations, capturing all customer configuration points in the service configuration documents. - Be a proposal leader, take ownership of FNZ customers' proposals, and help guide them effectively to deliver platform changes that are market-leading. - Have a delivery-focused vision in defining scope, be able to break down scope items into essential and optional functional elements that can be delivered over multiple releases if necessary. - Document any customer custom requirements and translate them into platform solutions. - Take ownership for delivering platform changes to FNZ customers, guide within the delivery team to ensure we deliver on time and quality. - Provide reviews and quality assurance of design documentation produced for new platform solutions, ensuring functionality is end-to-end and incorporating existing functionality reuse where possible. - Provide training programs and knowledge transfer services for FNZ customers. - Provide consulting services, when requested, to other FNZ customers and projects. ## Requirements ### Required Industrial Knowledge - Experience in CRM, KYC, onboarding, and customer information management - Leadership experience in a consulting, analysis, or architecture environment - Private banking/Wealth Management/general investment products and the markets in which FNZ and our customers operate - Understanding of the regulatory environment in which FNZ operates and knowledge of upcoming changes - 5+ years of experience in a delivery/consulting environment in the financial/wealth market ### Required Knowledge and Skills - Experience working in a business analysis/consulting role - Ability to demonstrate the creation of a continuous improvement environment and capability development - Strong knowledge of databases such as Oracle/MS SQL Server Management Studio is mandatory - Secure and able to take initiative in a customer and delivery-focused environment - Independent, self-sufficient, and delivery-focused work style - Superior analytical thinking - Commercial awareness - Essential intermediate computer skills - Excellent organizational, administrative, and time management skills - Good team communication skills, confident in dealing with internal and external customers - Highly developed written and oral communication skills - Fluent English mandatory. Fluent French or German is a strong asset - Availability to travel interregionally on request ## Who We Are FNZ is committed to opening up wealth so that everyone, everywhere, can invest in their future on their own terms. We know that the foundation for doing so already exists in the wealth management industry, but complexity is holding companies back. We have created the wealth growth platform to help. We provide a global, end-to-end wealth management platform that integrates modern technology with business and investment operations. All within a regulated financial institution. We collaborate with the world's leading financial institutions, with over US$2.2 trillion of assets on the platform (AoP). Together with our customers, we enable nearly 30 million people across all wealth segments to invest in their future. FNZ is a global fintech platform provider that works with financial institutions, wealth managers, and asset managers. The company has Swiss operations in Chiasso (Ticino) and Geneva.
descriptionByLocale.de: Rollen ### Rollenbeschreibung Als Senior Solution Consultant im Solution Consulting-Team bietet diese Rolle Expertise in den folgenden Bereichen: - Bereitstellung von aktuellen Kenntnissen, Bewusstsein für aktuelle Trends und die zukünftige Richtung der Private Banking- und Wealth Management-Branche - Präsentation und Erklärung der bestehenden Fähigkeiten von FNZ - Definition und Herausforderung des Umfangs eines Projekts - Erfassung und Dokumentation der Geschäftsziele der Kunden, um Anforderungen, Lösungsprojekte zu erstellen und gemeinsame Zielbetriebsmodelle (JTOMs) auszurichten - Plattform-Integrationsdesign - Unterstützung und Beratung bei der Geschäftsprozessoptimierung - Plattformkonformitätsregulierung und Beratung - Kunden-Schulungsprogramme und Wissensübertragung - Konfiguration und Lieferung der Plattform basierend auf der FNZ-Methode - Übergabe und Unterstützung für Analysten und Entwickler - Funktionale Überprüfungen und Walkthroughs von TDD - Definition von Geschäftsvorbereitungsprozessen und Ausrichtung von SLAs - Fehlerüberprüfung Zusätzlich führt und unterstützt die Rolle des Senior Solution Consultants: - Führung und Beratung bei der Wiederverwendung von Produkten unter den FNZ-Kunden - Schulung und Mentoring für andere Solution Consultants - Eigentümerschaft der Plattformlösungen und Sicherstellung ihrer End-to-End-Funktion - Definition und Einführung neuer Prozesse - Produktion und Wartung der strategischen Roadmap - Priorisierung des Umfangs - Konfiguration und Wartung des Backlogs - Unterstützung bei der Rekrutierung und Entwicklung neuer Talente - Unterstützung von Projektmanagern bei der Kundenverwaltung während des Lieferzyklus - Unterstützung bei Schätzungen und Planung von Build-Elementen - Motivation und Führung zu den besten Ergebnissen in den Projekten der anderen - Unterstützung des Vertriebsteams ### Teamverantwortlichkeiten Das Solution Consulting-Team ist verantwortlich für die Bereitstellung einer Vielzahl hochwertiger Dienstleistungen für die bestehenden und potenziellen Kunden von FNZ. Dazu gehören die Verantwortung für die Konfiguration der Plattform und die Ausführung des Model Wealth Solution-Konfigurationsprozesses für neue Plattformimplementierungen sowie die Unterstützung des Vertriebsteams bei der Gewinnung und Größenbestimmung neuer Projekte. Es umfasst auch die Ausführung einer Vielzahl von Beratungsaufgaben für bestehende und neue Kunden in verschiedenen Kontexten, einschließlich der Vorschlagsdefinition, der TOM-Definition, der Geschäftsprozessoptimierung, der Kundenschulung und Wissensübertragung sowie der Definition von maßgeschneiderten Anforderungen für Kundennutzungslösungen. Sobald die Geschäftsziele von FNZ-Kunden verstanden sind, müssen diese genau dokumentiert und in den Lieferprozess eingebracht werden, um sicherzustellen, dass sie leicht verständlich und präzise sind, um das richtige Ergebnis für unsere Kunden zu liefern. ### Spezifische Rollenverantwortlichkeiten - Bereitstellung von Führung und Unterstützung für das FNZ Solution Consulting-Team, Aufbau von Fähigkeiten und Unterstützung für jüngere Teammitglieder. Einflößen einer Kultur des kontinuierlichen Verbesserungsprozesses im Team. - Zusammenarbeit mit FNZ-Kunden und internen Stakeholdern zur Definition des Vorschlags und der Produktanforderungen. Bereitstellung von Marktkenntnissen bei Bedarf. Seien Sie ein SME in der Funktionalität der FNZ-Plattform und wenden Sie dieses Verständnis an, um Kunden bei der Definition von Vorschlägen zu unterstützen, die die Kernfähigkeiten der FNZ-Plattform optimal nutzen oder verbessern. - Vollständiges Verständnis eines Plattform-Referenz-Betriebsmodells, einschließlich Schnittstellen zwischen der Plattform und den Kunden- und FNZ-Investitionsoperationen. Bereitstellung von Beratungen zu Kunden bezüglich des besten Designs des Referenz-Betriebsmodells. - Experten in der Model Wealth Solution und Management des MWS-Konfigurationsprozesses für neue Plattformimplementierungen, Erfassung aller Kunden-Konfigurationspunkte in den Service-Konfigurationsdokumenten. - Seien Sie ein Vorschlagsführer, übernehmen Sie die Eigentümerschaft der Vorschläge von FNZ-Kunden und helfen Sie, sie effektiv zu führen, um Plattformänderungen zu liefern, die marktführend sind. - Haben Sie eine lieferungsorientierte Vision bei der Umfangsdefinition, können Sie Umfangselemente in essentielle und optionale funktionale Elemente aufteilen, die über mehrere Releases hinweg geliefert werden können, falls nötig. - Dokumentieren Sie alle maßgeschneiderten Kundenanforderungen und übersetzen Sie sie in Plattformlösungen. - Übernehmen Sie die Eigentümerschaft für die Lieferung von Plattformänderungen an FNZ-Kunden, führen Sie innerhalb des Lieferteams, um sicherzustellen, dass wir pünktlich und qualitativ liefern. - Bereitstellung von Überprüfungen und Qualitätskontrolle der für neue Plattformlösungen erstellten Design-Dokumentation, Sicherstellung der End-to-End-Funktionalität und Einbeziehung der Wiederverwendung bestehender Funktionalität, wo möglich. - Bereitstellung von Schulungsprogrammen und Wissensübertragungsdiensten für FNZ-Kunden. - Bereitstellung von Beratungsdiensten bei Bedarf für andere FNZ-Kunden und Projekte. ## Anforderungen ### Erforderliche Branchenkenntnisse - Erfahrung in CRM, KYC, Onboarding und Kundeninformationsmanagement - Führungserfahrung in einer Beratungs-, Analyse- oder Architekturumgebung - Private Banking/Wealth Management/allgemeine Investmentprodukte und die Märkte, in denen FNZ und unsere Kunden operieren - Verständnis der regulatorischen Umgebung, in der FNZ operiert, und Kenntnisse über anstehende Änderungen - 5+ Jahre Erfahrung in einer Lieferungs-/Beratungsumgebung im Finanz-/Wealth-Markt ### Erforderliche Kenntnisse und Fähigkeiten - Erfahrung in einer Business Analysis-/Beratungsrolle - Fähigkeit, die Schaffung einer kontinuierlichen Verbesserungs- und Fähigkeitsentwicklungsumgebung zu demonstrieren - Starke Kenntnisse in Datenbanken wie Oracle/MS SQL Server Management Studio sind obligatorisch - Sicher und in der Lage, Initiative in einer kunden- und lieferungsorientierten Umgebung zu ergreifen - Unabhängig, selbstständig und lieferungsorientierter Arbeitsstil - Überragendes analytisches Denken - Kommerzielles Bewusstsein - Essentielle mittlere Computerkundenschaften - Exzellente organisatorische, administrative und Zeitmanagementfähigkeiten - Gute Teamkommunikationsfähigkeiten, sicher im Umgang mit internen und externen Kunden - Hochentwickelte schriftliche und mündliche Kommunikationsfähigkeiten - Fließend Englisch obligatorisch. Fließend Französisch oder Deutsch ist ein starkes Asset - Verfügbarkeit zur interregionalen Reise bei Bedarf ## Wer wir sind FNZ ist bestrebt, das Vermögen zu öffnen, damit jeder, überall, sein zukünftiges Vermögen nach seinen eigenen Bedingungen investieren kann. Wir wissen, dass die Grundlage dafür bereits in der Vermögensverwaltungsbranche existiert, aber Komplexität hält Unternehmen zurück. Wir haben die Vermögenswachstumsplattform geschaffen, um zu helfen. Wir bieten eine globale, end-to-end-Vermögensverwaltungsplattform, die moderne Technologie mit Geschäfts- und Investitionsoperationen integriert. Alles innerhalb eines regulierten Finanzinstituts. Wir arbeiten mit den führenden Finanzinstitutionen der Welt zusammen, mit über US$2,2 Billionen Vermögen auf der Plattform (AoP). Zusammen mit unseren Kunden ermöglichen wir fast 30 Millionen Menschen in allen Vermögenssegmenten, in ihre Zukunft zu investieren. FNZ ist ein globaler Fintech-Plattformanbieter, der mit Finanzinstitutionen, Vermögensverwaltern und Asset-Managern zusammenarbeitet. Das Unternehmen hat Schweizer Standorte in Chiasso (Ticino) und Genf.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Rôles ### Description du rôle En tant que Consultant en Solutions Senior dans l'équipe Consulting en Solutions, ce rôle offre des expertises dans les domaines suivants : - Fournir des connaissances à jour, une conscience des tendances actuelles et de la direction future des industries Private Banking et Wealth Management - Présenter et expliquer les capacités existantes de FNZ - Définir et challenger la portée d'un projet - Capturer et documenter les objectifs métiers des clients pour créer des exigences, des projets de solutions et aligner des modèles opérationnels de référence conjoints (JTOMs) - Conception d'intégration de plateforme - Soutien et conseil pour la transformation des affaires - Réglementation et conseil en conformité de la plateforme - Programmes de formation des clients et transfert de connaissances - Configuration et livraison de la plateforme basée sur la méthodologie de FNZ - Transfert et soutien pour les Analystes et Développeurs - Revues fonctionnelles et walkthroughs de TDD - Définir les processus de préparation des affaires et aligner les SLAs - Vérification des défauts En outre, le rôle de Consultant en Solutions Senior effectue et soutient : - Leadership en propositions et guidance sur la réutilisation du produit parmi les clients de FNZ - Formation et mentorat pour d'autres consultants en solutions - Propriété des solutions de plateforme et s'assurer qu'elles fonctionnent de bout en bout - Définition et déploiement de nouveaux processus - Production et maintenance de la feuille de route stratégique - Priorisation de la portée - Configuration et maintenance du backlog - Soutien à la recruitment et au développement de nouveaux talents - Soutien aux Chefs de Projet dans la gestion des clients pendant le cycle de livraison - Soutien aux estimations et à la planification des éléments de build - Motivation et guidance vers les meilleurs résultats pour les autres dans leurs projets - Soutien à l'équipe de vente ### Responsabilités de l'équipe L'équipe Consulting en Solutions est responsable de fournir une gamme de services de haute valeur ajoutée aux clients existants et potentiels de FNZ. Cela inclut la responsabilité de la configuration de la plateforme et de l'exécution du processus de configuration de Model Wealth Solution pour les nouvelles implémentations de la plateforme, ainsi que le soutien de l'équipe de vente dans la conquête et la dimensionnement de nouveaux projets. Il comprend également l'exécution d'une variété de missions de conseil pour les clients existants et nouveaux dans divers contextes, y compris la définition de la proposition, la définition du TOM, la transformation des affaires, la formation et le transfert de connaissances des clients, et la définition d'exigences personnalisées pour les solutions de plateforme des clients. Une fois les objectifs métiers compris à partir des clients de FNZ, ceux-ci doivent être documentés avec précision et insérés dans le processus de livraison pour s'assurer qu'ils sont facilement compréhensibles et précis pour livrer le bon résultat à nos clients. ### Responsabilités spécifiques du rôle - Fournir un leadership et un soutien pour l'équipe FNZ Consulting en Solutions, construire des capacités et fournir un soutien aux membres plus juniors de l'équipe. Instiller une culture d'amélioration continue dans l'équipe. - Collaborer avec les clients de FNZ et les parties prenantes internes pour aider à définir la proposition et les exigences du produit. Fournir une expérience de marché lorsque demandé. Être un expert en matière de fonctionnalité de la plateforme FNZ et appliquer cette compréhension pour aider les clients à définir des propositions qui utilisent ou améliorent au mieux les capacités de la plateforme principale de FNZ. - Avoir une compréhension complète d'un Modèle Opérationnel de Référence de la Plateforme, y compris les interfaces entre la plateforme et les opérations des clients et les opérations d'investissement de FNZ. Fournir des conseils aux clients concernant la meilleure conception du modèle opérationnel de référence. - Être des experts en Model Wealth Solution et gérer le processus de configuration de MWS pour les nouvelles implémentations de la plateforme, capturer tous les points de configuration des clients dans les documents de configuration de service. - Être un leader en propositions, prendre la propriété des propositions des clients de FNZ et aider à les guider efficacement pour livrer des changements de plateforme qui sont leaders de marché. - Avoir une vision axée sur la livraison dans la définition de la portée, être capable de décomposer les éléments de portée en éléments fonctionnels essentiels et optionnels qui peuvent être livrés sur plusieurs versions si nécessaire. - Documenter toute exigence personnalisée du client et les traduire en solutions de plateforme. - Prendre la propriété de la livraison des changements de plateforme aux clients de FNZ, guider au sein de l'équipe de livraison pour s'assurer que nous livrons à temps et de qualité. - Fournir des revues et une assurance qualité de la documentation de conception produite pour les nouvelles solutions de plateforme, s'assurer que la fonctionnalité est de bout en bout et incorporer la réutilisation de la fonctionnalité existante lorsque possible. - Fournir des programmes de formation et des services de transfert de connaissances pour les clients de FNZ. - Fournir des services de conseil, lorsque demandé, à d'autres clients et projets de FNZ. ## Exigences ### Connaissances industrielles requises - Expérience en CRM, KYC, onboarding et gestion des informations clients - Expérience de leadership dans un environnement de conseil, d'analyse ou d'architecture - Private banking/Wealth Management/produits d'investissement généraux et les marchés dans lesquels FNZ et nos clients opèrent - Compréhension de l'environnement réglementaire dans lequel FNZ opère et connaissance des changements à venir - 5+ années d'expérience dans un environnement de livraison/consulting sur le marché financier/wealth ### Connaissances et compétences requises - Expérience de travail dans un rôle d'analyse des affaires/consulting - Capacité à démontrer la création d'un environnement d'amélioration continue et de développement des capacités - Connaissances solides des bases de données comme Oracle/MS SQL Server Management Studio sont obligatoires - Sécurisé et capable de prendre l'initiative dans un environnement axé sur le client et la livraison - Indépendant, autonome et style de travail axé sur la livraison - Pensée analytique supérieure - Conscience commerciale - Compétences informatiques intermédiaires essentielles - Excellentes compétences d'organisation, d'administration et de gestion du temps - Bonnes compétences de communication d'équipe, sûr dans le traitement avec les clients internes et externes - Compétences de communication écrite et orale hautement développées - Anglais fluide obligatoire. Français ou allemand fluide est un atout fort - Disponibilité à voyager interrégionalement sur demande ## Qui sommes-nous FNZ s'engage à ouvrir le patrimoine afin que chacun, partout, puisse investir dans son avenir selon ses propres termes. Nous savons que la base pour le faire existe déjà dans l'industrie de gestion du patrimoine, mais la complexité freine les entreprises. Nous avons créé la plateforme de croissance du patrimoine pour aider. Nous fournissons une plateforme globale, bout en bout de gestion du patrimoine qui intègre la technologie moderne avec les opérations commerciales et d'investissement. Tout cela dans un établissement financier réglementé. Nous collaborons avec les principales institutions financières du monde, avec plus de US$2,2 trillion d'actifs sur la plateforme (AoP). Ensemble avec nos clients, nous permettons à près de 30 millions de personnes dans tous les segments du patrimoine d'investir dans leur avenir. FNZ est un fournisseur mondial de plateformes fintech qui travaille avec des institutions financières, des gestionnaires de patrimoine et des gestionnaires d'actifs. L'entreprise a des opérations suisses à Chiasso (Ticino) et Genève.
